title: Tangential
summary: Defines weighted multi-tangentiality: replacing any input by a boundary-equivalent representative does not change the restricted output.

mathematicalContent.heading: Mathematical role
mathematicalContent.body: Defines weighted multi-tangentiality: replacing any input by a boundary-equivalent representative does not change the restricted output.

mathematicalContent.heading: Formal boundary
mathematicalContent.body: This page describes exactly the declarations present in PolyGJMSoperators/Tangential.lean; claims not represented by a declaration are not counted as verified.
